case_title: SUDHEER MATTA et al VS. LINH N. TRUONG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2007 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-31-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT.CLERK:F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) BOTH PARTIES PRESENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATTA, SUDHEER DBA PROGRAPHIC DESIGN ALAGIRISAMY, VANITHA DBA PROGRAPHIC DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, LINH N. $4,123.50 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,198.50, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF DAMAGES FOR THE SALE OF A DEFECTIVE VEHICLE.
